name: Decision Tree Regression
description: Decision Tree Regression builds a tree-based model to predict continuous numerical values using rule-based splits on input features.
input: This takes in a DataFrame and performs Decision Tree Regression
output: The Decision Tree Regression Model generated is passed along to the next nodes. The input DataFrame is also passed along to the next nodes

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing numerical and categorical input features used to build regression rules.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column representing the continuous numeric value the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Name of the output column where predicted numeric values are written after scoring.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls how the dataset is divided between training and validation for evaluating model accuracy.

fields.name: impurity
fields.title: Impurity
fields.description: Defines the metric used to measure variance reduction when creating tree splits.

fields.name: maxBins
fields.title: Max Bins
fields.description: Maximum number of bins used to discretize continuous features for split evaluation.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Limits how deep the decision tree can grow, controlling model complexity.

fields.name: minInfoGain
fields.title: Min Information Gain
fields.description: Minimum variance reduction required for a split to be considered valid.

fields.name: minInstancesPerNode
fields.title: Min Instances Per Node
fields.description: Minimum number of records required in each leaf node to ensure stable predictions.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed value used to control randomness and ensure reproducible tree construction.

fields.name: cacheNodeIds
fields.title: Cache Node Ids
fields.description: Enables caching of intermediate tree nodes to improve performance for deep trees.

fields.name: checkpointInterval
fields.title: Checkpoint Interval
fields.description: Defines how often intermediate training results are checkpointed to manage memory usage.

fields.name: maxMemoryInMB
fields.title: Max memory
fields.description: Maximum memory allocated for histogram-based calculations during tree training.

fields.name: minWeightFractionPerNode
fields.title: Min Weight Fraction per Node
fields.description: Ensures each split retains a minimum fraction of weighted data, improving robustness.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Optional column defining the relative importance of records during model training.

fields.name: minInfoGainGrid
fields.title: Min Information Gain Param Grid Search
fields.description: Candidate minimum information gain values evaluated during hyperparameter tuning.

fields.name: maxBinsGrid
fields.title: Max Bins Param Grid Search
fields.description: Range of max bins values tested to optimize feature discretization.

fields.name: maxDepthGrid
fields.title: Max Depth Param Grid Search
fields.description: Different tree depth values evaluated to balance accuracy and overfitting.
